summary: Completed frontend testing of all P0 blockers. All 9 features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Sidebar shows 'My Services' link at /my-services
Sidebar shows 'My Requests' link at /my-requests
Sidebar shows 'Submit New Request' link at /command-center
Sidebar shows 'Report an Issue' link at /report-issue
Sidebar shows 'The Ribbon Board' link at /ribbon-board
Quick Actions section REMOVED from sidebar
Sidebar shows 'Identity & Access' instead of 'Roles' at /iam
Old '/roles' link removed from sidebar
Logo pulse animation (animate-ping) present
Logo pulse animation (animate-pulse) present
The Ribbon Board page loads with Pool 1 (Partners) tab
The Ribbon Board page loads with Pool 2 (Vendors) tab
Pool 1 shows 'Partner Pool' description with 24-hour right of first refusal
Pool 2 shows 'Vendor/Freelancer Pool' description
My Requests page loads with stats cards (Total, Open, In Progress, Completed)
My Requests page has search and status filter
Report an Issue redirects to /command-center?type=issue
Command Center shows 'Incident / Issues' selected when type=issue
Identity & Access page shows 3 Roles, 4 Account Types, 17 Modules, 4 Plans
IAM Roles & Permissions tab shows Administrator, Operator, Standard User
IAM Account Types tab shows Partner, Media Client, Internal Staff, Vendor/Freelancer
IAM Permission Modules tab shows all 17 modules with actions
Partner account type shows subscription plans (Core, Engage, Lead-to-Cash, Scale)
Command Center has Attachments section under Categorization panel
Attachments section is compact with 'Click to upload or drag and drop' and 'Max 50 MB total'
critical_code_review_comments: The Ribbon Board correctly shows Pool 1 (Partners) and Pool 2 (Vendors) tabs
Identity & Access page properly replaces old Roles page with comprehensive IAM management
Logo pulse animation visible with both animate-ping and animate-pulse classes
Attachments moved under Categorization panel in Command Center as requested
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 blockers verified working: 1) Sidebar has My Services, My Requests, Submit New Request, Report an Issue, The Ribbon Board. 2) Quick Actions removed. 3) Identity & Access replaces Roles. 4) Ribbon Board has Pool 1/2 tabs. 5) Logo pulse animation working. 6) Attachments under Categorization. 7) Report an Issue redirects to Command Center with type=issue.

p0_ribbon_board.pool_descriptions: WORKING - Partner Pool and Vendor/Freelancer Pool descriptions

p0_attachments_compact.compact_design: WORKING - Click to upload, Max 50 MB total

p0_iam_page.account_types_tab: WORKING - Partner, Media Client, Internal Staff, Vendor/Freelancer
